summary: A Go-based orchestration and assertion testing framework with plugin support and Kubernetes integration.
concerns: excessive auto-commit session metadata cluttering git history
version injection via ldflags requires strict build process adherence
untracked files and staged changes indicate incomplete commits
suggestions: add session metadata to .gitignore to reduce commit noise
consolidate or document the multiple config directories (.claude, .gorchestra, GOrchestra)
focus on the runner and detector modules as they contain the core logic
